items.title: Cam Boozer on why he played eight games of summer league: “It’s why I love the game—for games like this, where it’s high-intensity, it’s back-and-forth, and you’re competing against great players.”
items.author: erichama
items.body_excerpt: Yesterday’s game definitely didn’t end the way that we wanted it to, but us Grizzlies fans couldn’t be more excited for the future of our team. Cam has so much talent, and he only just turned 19-years-old! It’s wild to think that he’ll be the youngest player in the league next…
